title: Welcome: Free Claude Code materials for everyone
excerpt: Why this blog exists, what you’ll find here, and how to use these resources responsibly.

title: Claude Code CLI basics: install, start, and your first workflow
excerpt: A beginner guide to running Claude Code from the terminal: setup, starting a session, and safe habits.

title: Free materials: prompts, checklists, and practice tasks for Claude Code CLI
excerpt: Copy/paste-friendly resources: prompt patterns, review checklist, and small exercises you can do offline.

title: Best practices: clear prompts and reviewing code changes
excerpt: Simple rules for writing prompts that get good results and for reviewing every change before you accept it.

title: Learning with limited resources: slow internet, shared PCs, little time
excerpt: Practical tips for using Claude Code when bandwidth, hardware, or time are limited—and how to study in groups.

title: How to debug with Claude Code: understand errors, don't just fix them
excerpt: Learn to use Claude Code as a debugging partner—paste the error, ask why before asking for a fix, and build real problem-solving skills.

title: Your first real project with Claude Code: from blank folder to working program
excerpt: A step-by-step guide to picking, planning, and building your first small project—one piece at a time—using Claude Code.

title: How to understand code you didn't write using Claude Code
excerpt: Techniques for reading unfamiliar code: ask for summaries, trace inputs, predict behavior, and find patterns you can reuse.
